notes: Raw source values only. Do not store consensus in this file.
Ignore null values when computing consensus.
If only one source is non-null, use that source.
If no external source is non-null, fall back to internalFallback.
Keep ETF-to-bucket mapping in code, not in this JSON.

US_Large_Cap_Equity.notes: Use for broad US large-cap / total-market exposures.

US_Small_Value.notes: Vanguard small-cap midpoint from 5.1%-7.1%. Consider adding a separate deterministic value tilt in code.

Developed_ExUS_Small_Value.notes: Treat as Developed_ExUS_Equity plus a deterministic factor/value premium until directly sourced.

Emerging_Markets_Equity.notes: Morningstar and JPM both provide direct EM equity assumptions in the roundup.

US_Treasury_Short.notes: 10-yr forward cash/T-bill assumption. Lower than current Fed Funds Rate — reflects expected rate normalisation over the horizon.

US_Investment_Grade_Credit.notes: JPM direct IG credit assumption from 2026 LTCMA fixed income table.

Emerging_Market_Debt_Hard_Currency.notes: Vanguard midpoint from 5.1%-6.1% for hedged EM sovereign bonds; BlackRock 4.7%; JPM 6.3%.

REITs.notes: Use JPM global REITs until additional sourced values are available.

Gold.notes: Use JPM gold until additional sourced values are available.

Commodities.notes: No ETF in current universe maps to this bucket. Reserved for future use.

Cash.notes: JPM cash from 2026 LTCMA fixed income table. 10-yr forward; lower than current Fed Funds Rate.
